ChildElements.Name: LBL_JS
ChildElements.Formula: var total = COUNTIF(:GRD_SALES, "SALES_ID"); var completed = COUNTIF(:GRD_SALES, "SALES_ID", "[STATUS_CODE] = 'COMPLETED'"); if(total > 0) { return ROUND(completed / total * 100, 1) + "%"; } else { return "0%"; }

ChildElements.Name: LBL_CASE
ChildElements.Formula: CASE(COUNTIF(:GRD_SALES, "SALES_ID") = 0, "데이터 없음", COUNTIF(:GRD_SALES, "SALES_ID", "[STATUS_CODE] = 'COMPLETED'") / COUNTIF(:GRD_SALES, "SALES_ID") >= 0.8, "A등급", COUNTIF(:GRD_SALES, "SALES_ID", "[STATUS_CODE] = 'COMPLETED'") / COUNTIF(:GRD_SALES, "SALES_ID") >= 0.5, "B등급", "C등급")
